summary: Minimal smoke test after adding /app/vercel.json for Vercel deployment. All 3 backend endpoints and frontend home page verified — runtime app unaffected by the static Vercel config file.

smoke_test_results.vercel_json: EXISTS at /app/vercel.json — valid JSON with services (frontend + backend) and rewrites for /api and catch-all
smoke_test_results.GET /api/subscribe/config: 200 OK — {mode:'mock', key_id:'', amount_paise:4900, currency:'INR', plan_name:'LinkPlay Pro (Monthly)'}
smoke_test_results.Frontend home page: site-header, hero-title ('Paste a Terabox link. Play it instantly.'), and paste-link-input all visible and rendered correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: vercel.json was added at repo root for Vercel platform deployment only. It does not affect runtime behavior of the Emergent preview. Full regression already covered in iteration_2.json (16/16 backend + full frontend passed).
